name: SIPHRKTINSDEL
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[SIPHRKTINSDEL] ON [dbo].[SIPARISHAREKETLERI]
FOR INSERT, DELETE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @SB_REF AS INT
DECLARE @SD_REF AS INT

DECLARE SIPHRKTINSDELDcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
select DISTINCT SB_REF from DELETED
OPEN SIPHRKTINSDELDcur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM SIPHRKTINSDELDcur 
INTO @SB_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	
	IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SIPARISHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR>0 AND KAPALI=0)>0
		UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET KAPALI=0 WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND KAPALI=1 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0
	ELSE 
		UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET KAPALI=1 WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND KAPALI=0 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0

FETCH NEXT FROM SIPHRKTINSDELDcur
INTO @SB_REF;
END  
CLOSE SIPHRKTINSDELDcur;  
DEALLOCATE SIPHRKTINSDELDcur;


DECLARE SIPHRKTINSDELIcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
select DISTINCT SB_REF from INSERTED
OPEN SIPHRKTINSDELIcur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM SIPHRKTINSDELIcur 
INTO @SB_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	
	IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SIPARISHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR>0 AND KAPALI=0)>0
		UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET KAPALI=0 WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND KAPALI=1 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0
	ELSE 
		UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET KAPALI=1 WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND KAPALI=0 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0

FETCH NEXT FROM SIPHRKTINSDELIcur
INTO @SB_REF;
END  
CLOSE SIPHRKTINSDELIcur;  
DEALLOCATE SIPHRKTINSDELIcur
